steps.title: Read el Castillo's row
steps.content: The sentence gives el Castillo's age range, 1,100 to 1,400 years ago. The matching table row identifies its height as 40 meters.

steps.title: Drop other pyramid heights
steps.content: A is the Great Pyramid in Mexico, B is the Pyramid of Sahure, and D is the Pyramid of Djoser. Only 40 meters belongs to el Castillo. The answer is C.
